scenario.title: The Feature Implementer
scenario.context: You're using AI to help implement a new feature in an existing codebase. You need to provide enough context about the codebase patterns and conventions for the AI to generate code that fits.
scenario.goal: Write a prompt that guides AI to generate production-ready code following existing patterns, conventions, and architecture.
constraints: Include relevant existing code as context
Request proper error handling and types
scenario.exampleInput: Add user notification preferences feature to React/TypeScript app. Existing patterns: React Query for data, Zod for validation, TailwindCSS. Need: API endpoint, DB schema, React component, form validation.
hints: Show examples of similar existing code
Define what 'production-ready' means for this codebase

scoringGuide.excellent: Relevant code examples with patterns explained
Full file structure with naming conventions
